query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 12 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (12, 10) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%music%' OR name LIKE '%Music%'
    OR name LIKE '%ao vivo%'
    OR name LIKE '%karaok%' OR name LIKE '%Karaok%'
    OR name LIKE '%jazz%' OR name LIKE '%Jazz%'
    OR name LIKE '%blues%' OR name LIKE '%Blues%'
    OR name LIKE '%samba%' OR name LIKE '%Samba%'
    OR name LIKE '%forró%' OR name LIKE '%Forró%' OR name LIKE '%forro%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 12 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (12, 10) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%music%' OR name LIKE '%Music%'
    OR name LIKE '%ao vivo%'
    OR name LIKE '%karaok%' OR name LIKE '%Karaok%'
    OR name LIKE '%jazz%' OR name LIKE '%Jazz%'
    OR name LIKE '%blues%' OR name LIKE '%Blues%'
    OR name LIKE '%samba%' OR name LIKE '%Samba%'
    OR name LIKE '%forró%' OR name LIKE '%Forró%' OR name LIKE '%forro%');
